/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_string.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_dynamic_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/datastructs/Complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/datastructs/String.cpp.o -o tests  /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
